verification_notes: Vision-verified against PDF page image. Single-page cult one-pager.

cult.name: Path of Immanent Mastery
cult.subtitle: Mystery Cult of Dragon Worship
cult.magic_system_notes: Uses Theist Miracles heading and Exhort/Devotion skills. Thematically mystical (dragon worship) but mechanically theist in current one-pager. Note at bottom: 'This cult will change when AiG is released.'

requirements.initiate: 50% in five of the cult skills. Succeed in 3 of the rolls to convince the examiners.
requirements.rune_lord: 90% in cult skills. Bold are mandatory. Succeed in charismatic wisdom test

cult.cult_skills_notes: Oath is taken at initiate. Divine intervention learned at rune level.

theist_miracles.note: italic = acolyte (none), bold = rune level. Superscript 2 indicates rune-level spells.

chargen_implications.note: This cult is from Kralorela (East Genertela) and is not part of the 8 AiG cultures currently supported. It would only be relevant if Kralorelan cultures are added. The cult uses theist mechanics despite its mystical theme.
chargen_implications.mysticism_status: NOT a mysticism cult mechanically. Hannu (Discord 2026-05-17) said it 'might' use mysticism in future but current data uses theist miracles.
